title: Log in with username/password and reach the correct role home screen
description: Verifies a staff user can authenticate with tenant UUID plus username/password and is routed to their role-appropriate main screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid tenant UUID into the tenant field
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on their role-appropriate main screen

title: Log in with PIN and reach the correct role home screen
description: Verifies a staff user can authenticate with tenant UUID plus PIN and is routed to their role-appropriate main screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid tenant UUID into the tenant field
Select the PIN login option
Fill a valid PIN into the PIN field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on their role-appropriate main screen

title: Create a paid cashier order with a valid discount or coupon
description: Verifies a cashier can add items, apply a valid discount/coupon, complete payment, and see an order creation confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid tenant UUID into the tenant field
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the cashier screen
Select a product from the menu
Add the selected product to the cart
Apply a valid coupon or discount
Choose a payment method
Complete payment
Verify an order created confirmation is visible

title: Advance an order through Preparing, Ready, and Completed
description: Creates an order in POS and verifies kitchen staff can advance it through all statuses until completion and the final status is visible in the kitchen list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /cashier
Add a product to the order
Select cash as the payment method
Submit the order payment to create the order
Click the logout or lock session control
Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to the kitchen screen
Select a station option to open the kitchen monitor
Open the most recently created order from the order list
Change the order status to Preparing
Change the order status to Ready
Change the order status to Completed
Verify the order is shown as completed in the kitchen order list

title: Courier can mark an assigned delivery as picked up and delivered
description: Verifies a courier can open an assigned delivery, mark it picked up, then mark it delivered and see the delivery status update in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant ID field with a valid tenant ID
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the courier panel
Locate an assigned delivery in the list and open its details
Mark the order as picked up
Mark the order as delivered
Verify the delivery shows a delivered status in the courier UI

title: Start a table session, send an order, and resume the session with items preserved
description: Logs in as a waiter, starts a table session, adds items, sends them to kitchen, leaves and reopens the session, and verifies previously added items remain visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to the waiter panel
Select an available table
Start a session for the selected table
Add a product to the table session
Send the session order to the kitchen
Leave or close the session view to return to the table list
Reopen the same table session
Verify previously added items are still displayed in the reopened table session

title: Kitchen order list loads and shows current orders
description: Logs in and verifies the kitchen monitor displays a list of current orders for the selected station.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to the kitchen screen
Select a station option to open the kitchen monitor
Verify a list of orders is displayed in the kitchen monitor

title: Waiter can add items over time before sending to kitchen
description: Starts a table session, adds items in separate actions, and verifies the session shows an accumulated item list before sending.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to the waiter panel
Select an available table
Start a session for the selected table
Add a first product to the table session
Add a second product to the table session
Verify the table session shows multiple items in the current session

title: Place a guest order from the public QR menu
description: As a guest, browses the QR menu, adds items to cart, completes checkout with guest details, and sees an order confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /qr
Select a product from the menu
Add the selected product to the cart
Proceed to checkout
Fill in a guest name into the guest details form
Fill in a guest contact field with a valid value
Submit the public order
Verify an order confirmation view is displayed

title: Courier can view assigned deliveries list
description: Verifies the courier panel loads and shows a deliveries list state that can be interacted with (either deliveries displayed or a clear empty state).

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant ID field with a valid tenant ID
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the courier panel
Verify the assigned deliveries list is displayed or an empty state is displayed

title: Courier can open a delivery detail from the list
description: Verifies a courier can select a delivery from the list and view its detail view with delivery actions available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant ID field with a valid tenant ID
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the courier panel
Locate an assigned delivery in the list and open its details
Verify the delivery details view is displayed with delivery progress actions available

title: Waiter can switch between table list and an active session without losing state
description: Creates a table session, adds an item, navigates back to the table list, returns to the same session, and verifies the session state persists.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to the waiter panel
Select an available table
Start a session for the selected table
Add a product to the table session
Leave or close the session view to return to the table list
Reopen the same table session
Verify the added product is still present in the session after returning

title: Guest can edit cart quantities before checkout
description: Adds an item to the cart from the QR menu, changes quantity, and verifies the cart updates before proceeding to checkout.

steps.description: Navigate to /qr
Select a product from the menu
Add the selected product to the cart
Open the cart
Increase the quantity of the cart item
Verify the cart shows the updated quantity for the item

title: Kitchen station selection changes the visible order list
description: Verifies switching the station selection updates which orders are shown on the kitchen monitor.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to the kitchen screen
Select a station option to open the kitchen monitor
Note a visible order identifier from the list
Select a different station option
Verify the kitchen order list updates after changing station selection

title: Recover from invalid coupon/discount and still complete a cashier order
description: Verifies a cashier sees a validation error for an invalid coupon/discount, can remove or bypass it, and successfully complete payment with an order created confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid tenant UUID into the tenant field
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the cashier screen
Select a product from the menu
Add the selected product to the cart
Apply an invalid coupon or discount
Verify a coupon or discount validation error is displayed
Remove the applied coupon or discount
Choose a payment method
Complete payment
Verify an order created confirmation is visible

title: Prevent cashier checkout when cart is empty
description: Verifies the cashier cannot complete payment when no items are in the cart and is shown an appropriate empty-cart blocker state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid tenant UUID into the tenant field
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the cashier screen
Attempt to proceed to payment with an empty cart
Verify checkout is blocked due to an empty cart

title: Reject login with wrong password and keep user unauthenticated
description: Verifies the login form blocks authentication with an incorrect password and shows a login error without routing to an authenticated screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid tenant UUID into the tenant field
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is displayed and the user remains on the login screen

title: Courier cannot deliver an order before pickup
description: Verifies the UI prevents marking an order as delivered before it has been marked as picked up.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant ID field with a valid tenant ID
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the courier panel
Locate an assigned delivery in the list and open its details
Attempt to mark the order as delivered without marking it picked up
Verify a validation or blocking state is shown and the order is not marked as delivered

title: Reject PIN login with invalid PIN
description: Verifies the PIN login flow blocks authentication with an invalid PIN and shows an error without routing to an authenticated screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid tenant UUID into the tenant field
Select the PIN login option
Fill an invalid PIN into the PIN field
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is displayed and the user remains on the login screen

title: Prevent skipping directly to Completed from a new order
description: Creates a new order and verifies the kitchen UI does not allow setting the status to Completed without progressing through intermediate statuses.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /cashier
Add a product to the order
Select cash as the payment method
Submit the order payment to create the order
Click the logout or lock session control
Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to the kitchen screen
Select a station option to open the kitchen monitor
Open the most recently created order from the order list
Attempt to change the order status directly to Completed
Verify an order status validation or restriction is visible and the order is not marked completed

title: Reject login when tenant UUID is missing
description: Verifies the login form requires a tenant UUID and blocks login when it is not provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify a tenant validation error is displayed and the user remains unauthenticated

title: Guest cannot submit checkout without required guest details
description: Proceeds to QR checkout with items and verifies required guest detail fields block order submission when left empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /qr
Select a product from the menu
Add the selected product to the cart
Proceed to checkout
Attempt to submit the public order without filling required guest details
Verify a guest details validation error is visible and the order is not confirmed

title: Courier delivered action locks further progress changes
description: Verifies once an order is marked delivered, the UI prevents further delivery progress changes for that order.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant ID field with a valid tenant ID
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the courier panel
Locate an assigned delivery in the list and open its details
Mark the order as picked up
Mark the order as delivered
Attempt to change delivery status again after delivered
Verify delivery progress controls are disabled or no longer available for the delivered order

title: Validate required fields before username/password login submission
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission when required tenant/credentials are missing and displays validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the login form
Verify required-field validation errors are displayed

title: Waiter cannot send an empty table session to kitchen
description: Starts a table session without adding items and verifies the UI prevents sending an empty order to the kitchen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant UUID field with {{TENANT_UUID}}
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to the waiter panel
Select an available table
Start a session for the selected table
Attempt to send the session order to the kitchen
Verify an empty-order prevention message is visible and no order is submitted

title: Courier pickup action is idempotent in UI (no duplicate state changes)
description: Verifies repeatedly triggering the pickup action does not create inconsistent UI state and the order remains in a picked up state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the tenant ID field with a valid tenant ID
Fill in the PIN field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the courier panel
Locate an assigned delivery in the list and open its details
Mark the order as picked up
Attempt to mark the order as picked up again
Verify the order remains in a picked up state and no duplicate delivery progress entries are shown

title: Guest cannot proceed to checkout with an empty cart
description: Verifies the QR menu prevents navigating to or submitting checkout when no items have been added to the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /qr
Attempt to proceed to checkout
Verify an empty-cart prevention message is visible or checkout is blocked

title: Validate PIN format before submission
description: Verifies the PIN login flow prevents submission or shows validation feedback when the PIN format is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid tenant UUID into the tenant field
Select the PIN login option
Fill a non-numeric value into the PIN field
Submit the login form
Verify a PIN validation error is displayed and the user remains unauthenticated
